title: Aquatic Torches for Fabric 1.21.1
description: Waterloggable glow squid torches for Tricky Trials.
body:
This is a 1.21.1 port of Aquatic Torches (originally by [realmayus](https://modrinth.com/user/realmayus) under MIT) for everyone's convenience.

![An aquatic torch in a shipwreck.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6df3f51a528244672e11daf1ac2d1805c0ea0f74.png)

The original can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquatic-torches/). It hasn't been updated in a year, and I really needed it for an SMP, so...

The only thing I changed was making the torches use the Glow particle instead of Glow Squid Ink, because I found it too obtrusive.

All the assets belong to them, that being models and textures, and I take no credit. The mod itself was recoded from scratch though.
